title: ACCA — Get Hired in 2026
author: Field notes for Hrithik Kasana
description: A working playbook for a part-qualified ACCA candidate (11 of 12 papers passed, ATX-UK and SBR done) with real hands-on US tax compliance experience and UK tax/IFRS exam depth, sorting out the actual blockers standing between him and a UK-facing accounting or tax career in 2026: a Practical Experience Requirement clock that may not have even started, a UK graduate-hiring market visibly being compressed by AI, a visa-sponsorship math problem that has nothing to do with resume quality, and a two-resume identity problem that's been hiding his strongest asset — the US-UK cross-border tax combination almost nobody else applying has.
